supplier_name.description: The name of the company issuing the invoice. Return null if not found.

invoice_date.description: The date the invoice was issued. Return null if not found.

invoice_number.description: The unique invoice identifier. Return null if not found.

line_items.description: List of items purchased. Return an empty array if no items are found.

item_name.description: The description or name of the product/service.

quantity.description: The number of items purchased. Return 1 if not explicitly stated.

rate.description: The unit price of a single item. Remove currency symbols. Return null if not stated.

amount.description: The total cost for this line item. Remove currency symbols. Return null if not stated.

total_invoice_amount.description: The final grand total amount of the invoice including taxes. Remove currency symbols. Return null if not found.
